$comment: Manual list of European fixtures for PL teams. The minutes engine uses this
to apply a pre-/post-European rotation penalty to the GW that flanks the
European match. Update as new European games are announced; the ingest
script is idempotent on (team_short, competition, kickoff_time).
team_short    — FPL short code (ARS, MCI, LIV, …)
competition   — UCL | UEL | UECL | FA | EFL | OTHER
importance    — 1.0 default; bump to 2.0 for finals, 1.5 for semis
